content.full_text:
March 15, 1978

Mr. W.L. Crawford  
2407 Geraldine Drive  
Pleasant Hill, California 94523

Dear Mr. Crawford:

Please excuse the delay in our answer to your letter of January 16, 1978. I hope I will be able to answer your questions with respect to any filing obligations that remain for you in connection with the March 7 election. If it turns out that you have filed either of the first two statements incorrectly, I will be happy to discuss the correction of them by telephone. You may call me at 916/322-5662.

If you receive contributions for your separate campaign expenses, you should report such contributions as receipts on your candidate's statement, Form 430. If you spend the money directly, report the payment to the vendor involved on Schedule E, Part 2 of Form 430.

If instead of spending the money directly, you turn it over to the committee, you should still report the receipt of the contribution on Schedule A of your own Form 430. Report your payment to the committee on Part 1 of Schedule E of your Form 430. The committee will report the receipt of the money from you on Part 2 of Schedule A of its Form 420.

Bear in mind that the committee will have to report the total amount of money spent in behalf of each of the two candidates it is supporting on the allocation section of the first page of its Form 420.

If you have further questions, please call.

Sincerely,

John D. Giansello  
Political Reform Analyst

16 Jan. 1978

Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 K Street
Sacramento, CA 95814

Gentlemen:

I am a candidate for city clerk in the March 7 municipal election, and have an inquiry re filing of forms required.

I will probably join forces with a council candidate to share expenses. In other words, we will have a joint committee to work for us, and we will share all expenses (except photography).

However, I may possibly receive a monetary contribution toward my expenses only, not toward the joint expenses.

In such case, how would I handle the latter as far as filing forms is concerned?

Sincerely,

W. L. Crawford
2407 Geraldine Dr.
Pleasant Hill, CA 94523
